targets.rawSql: SELECT $timeSeries as t, sum(Sum) as "Total Tokens" FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.token.usage' $conditionalTest(AND Attributes['gen_ai.request.model'] IN (${model:singlequote}), $model) $conditionalTest(AND Attributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] IN (${agent:singlequote}), $agent) $conditionalTest(AND Attributes['gen_ai.provider.name'] IN (${provider:singlequote}), $provider) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT $timeSeries as t, sum(Sum) as "Input Tokens" FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.token.usage' AND Attributes['gen_ai.token.type'] = 'input' $conditionalTest(AND Attributes['gen_ai.request.model'] IN (${model:singlequote}), $model) $conditionalTest(AND Attributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] IN (${agent:singlequote}), $agent) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT $timeSeries as t, sum(Sum) as "Output Tokens" FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.token.usage' AND Attributes['gen_ai.token.type'] = 'output' $conditionalTest(AND Attributes['gen_ai.request.model'] IN (${model:singlequote}), $model) $conditionalTest(AND Attributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] IN (${agent:singlequote}), $agent) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT sumIf(Sum, Attributes['gen_ai.token.type'] = 'output') / nullIf(sumIf(Sum, Attributes['gen_ai.token.type'] = 'input'), 0) as ratio FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.token.usage' $conditionalTest(AND Attributes['gen_ai.request.model'] IN (${model:singlequote}), $model) $conditionalTest(AND Attributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] IN (${agent:singlequote}), $agent)

SELECT Attributes['gen_ai.request.model'] as model, sum(Sum) as tokens FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.token.usage' $conditionalTest(AND Attributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] IN (${agent:singlequote}), $agent) $conditionalTest(AND Attributes['gen_ai.provider.name'] IN (${provider:singlequote}), $provider) GROUP BY model ORDER BY tokens DESC

SELECT Attributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] as agent, sum(Sum) as tokens FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.token.usage' $conditionalTest(AND Attributes['gen_ai.request.model'] IN (${model:singlequote}), $model) $conditionalTest(AND Attributes['gen_ai.provider.name'] IN (${provider:singlequote}), $provider) GROUP BY agent ORDER BY tokens DESC

panels.title: Input vs Output Tokens Over Time

targets.rawSql: $columns(Attributes['gen_ai.token.type'] as token_type, sum(Sum) as tokens) FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.token.usage' $conditionalTest(AND Attributes['gen_ai.request.model'] IN (${model:singlequote}), $model) $conditionalTest(AND Attributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] IN (${agent:singlequote}), $agent) GROUP BY t, token_type ORDER BY t

$increase(Value) FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.cost' $conditionalTest(AND Attributes['gen_ai.request.model'] IN (${model:singlequote}), $model) $conditionalTest(AND Attributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] IN (${agent:singlequote}), $agent) $conditionalTest(AND Attributes['gen_ai.provider.name'] IN (${provider:singlequote}), $provider)

SELECT (argMax(c.Value, c.TimeUnix) - argMin(c.Value, c.TimeUnix)) / nullIf(argMax(r.Value, r.TimeUnix) - argMin(r.Value, r.TimeUnix), 0) as avg_cost FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_sum c INNER JOIN infraspec.otel_metrics_sum r ON c.ServiceName = r.ServiceName WHERE c.TimeUnix >= $from AND c.TimeUnix <= $to AND c.ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND c.MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.cost' AND r.TimeUnix >= $from AND r.TimeUnix <= $to AND r.ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND r.MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.operation.duration'

SELECT (argMax(Value, TimeUnix) - argMin(Value, TimeUnix)) / nullIf(toFloat64(max(TimeUnix) - min(TimeUnix)), 0) * 86400 as daily_rate FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.cost'

SELECT c.total_cost / nullIf(t.total_tokens, 0) * 1000 as cost_per_1k FROM (SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) - argMin(Value, TimeUnix) as total_cost FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.cost') c, (SELECT sum(Sum) as total_tokens FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.token.usage') t

SELECT Attributes['gen_ai.request.model'] as model, argMax(Value, TimeUnix) - argMin(Value, TimeUnix) as cost FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.cost' GROUP BY model ORDER BY cost DESC

SELECT Attributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] as agent, argMax(Value, TimeUnix) - argMin(Value, TimeUnix) as cost FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.cost' GROUP BY agent ORDER BY cost DESC

$increaseColumns(Attributes['gen_ai.provider.name'] as provider, Value) FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.cost' $conditionalTest(AND Attributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] IN (${agent:singlequote}), $agent)

SELECT countIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.evaluation.score.label'] = 'passed') / nullIf(count(), 0) as pass_rate FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'evaluate.draft' AND SpanAttributes['gen_ai.evaluation.score.label'] != ''

SELECT avg(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['quality_score'])) as avg_score FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'evaluate.draft' AND SpanAttributes['quality_score'] != ''
SELECT count() as evaluated FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'evaluate.draft' AND SpanAttributes['gen_ai.evaluation.score.label'] != ''

SELECT countIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.evaluation.score.label'] = 'passed') as passed FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'evaluate.draft' AND SpanAttributes['gen_ai.evaluation.score.label'] != ''

SELECT countIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.evaluation.score.label'] = 'failed') as failed FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'evaluate.draft' AND SpanAttributes['gen_ai.evaluation.score.label'] != ''

SELECT $timeSeries as t, avg(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['quality_score'])) as avg_score FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'evaluate.draft' AND SpanAttributes['quality_score'] != '' GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
SELECT $timeSeries as t, 70 as threshold FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'evaluate.draft' GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

$columns(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.evaluation.score.label'] as label, count() as cnt) FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'evaluate.draft' AND SpanAttributes['gen_ai.evaluation.score.label'] != '' GROUP BY t, label ORDER BY t
SELECT count() as pipelines FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName LIKE 'agent.%' AND SpanName = 'agent.research'

SELECT avg(Duration / 1000000000) as avg_duration_s FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName LIKE 'agent.%' $conditionalTest(AND SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] IN (${agent:singlequote}), $agent)

SELECT quantile(0.99)(Duration / 1000000000) as p99_s FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName LIKE 'agent.%' $conditionalTest(AND SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] IN (${agent:singlequote}), $agent)
SELECT 1 - countIf(StatusCode = 'Error') / nullIf(count(), 0) as success_rate FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName LIKE 'agent.%'
$columns(SpanName as agent, avg(Duration / 1000000000) as avg_s) FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName LIKE 'agent.%' GROUP BY t, agent ORDER BY t

SELECT $timeSeries as t, countIf(StatusCode = 'Error') / nullIf(count(), 0) as error_rate FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName LIKE 'agent.%' GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT replaceAll(SpanName, 'agent.', '') as agent, count() as calls, quantile(0.5)(Duration / 1000000000) as p50, quantile(0.9)(Duration / 1000000000) as p90, quantile(0.99)(Duration / 1000000000) as p99, countIf(StatusCode = 'Error') as errors, countIf(StatusCode = 'Error') / nullIf(count(), 0) as error_pct FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName LIKE 'agent.%' GROUP BY agent ORDER BY agent
$increase(Value) FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.error.count'
$increase(Value) FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.retry.count'
$increase(Value) FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.fallback.count'

SELECT r.retries / nullIf(d.ops, 0) as avg_retries FROM (SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) - argMin(Value, TimeUnix) as retries FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.retry.count') r, (SELECT count() as ops FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName LIKE 'gen_ai.chat%') d

SELECT SpanAttributes['error.type'] as error_type, count() as cnt FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND StatusCode = 'Error' AND SpanAttributes['error.type'] != '' GROUP BY error_type ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT SpanAttributes['gen_ai.provider.name'] as provider, count() as errors FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND StatusCode = 'Error' AND SpanAttributes['gen_ai.provider.name'] != '' GROUP BY provider ORDER BY errors DESC

$columns(SpanAttributes['error.type'] as error_type, count() as cnt) FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND StatusCode = 'Error' AND SpanAttributes['error.type'] != '' GROUP BY t, error_type ORDER BY t
SELECT avg(Duration / 1000000) as avg_ms FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanAttributes['db.system'] = 'postgresql'

SELECT d.db_spans / nullIf(p.pipelines, 0) as queries_per_pipeline FROM (SELECT count() as db_spans FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanAttributes['db.system'] = 'postgresql') d, (SELECT count() as pipelines FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'agent.research') p
SELECT quantile(0.99)(Duration / 1000000) as p99_ms FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanAttributes['db.system'] = 'postgresql'
SELECT countIf(StatusCode = 'Error') as db_errors FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanAttributes['db.system'] = 'postgresql'

SELECT $timeSeries as t, avg(Duration / 1000000) as db_avg_ms FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanAttributes['db.system'] = 'postgresql' GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
SELECT $timeSeries as t, avg(Duration / 1000000000) as pipeline_avg_s FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName LIKE 'agent.%' GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

$columns(SpanAttributes['db.operation'] as op, avg(Duration / 1000000) as avg_ms) FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanAttributes['db.system'] = 'postgresql' AND SpanAttributes['db.operation'] != '' GROUP BY t, op ORDER BY t

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT ServiceName FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' ORDER BY ServiceName
list.name: service
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT ServiceName FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' ORDER BY ServiceName

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT SpanAttributes['gen_ai.request.model'] as model FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanAttributes['gen_ai.request.model'] != '' ORDER BY model
list.name: model
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT SpanAttributes['gen_ai.request.model'] as model FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanAttributes['gen_ai.request.model'] != '' ORDER BY model

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] as agent FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] != '' ORDER BY agent
list.name: agent
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] as agent FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] != '' ORDER BY agent

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT Attributes['gen_ai.provider.name'] as provider FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_sum WHERE TimeUnix > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND Attributes['gen_ai.provider.name'] != '' ORDER BY provider
list.name: provider
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT Attributes['gen_ai.provider.name'] as provider FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_sum WHERE TimeUnix > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND Attributes['gen_ai.provider.name'] != '' ORDER BY provider
